HVAC SPECIFICATION DOCUMENT
===========================

Project: North Tower Conference Room B
Client: TechCorp Industries
Date: 2024-01-15

ROOM GEOMETRY
-------------
Room: Executive Conference B
Dimensions: 40 ft × 30 ft × 12 ft (ceiling)
Floor Area: 1,200 sq ft
Volume: 14,400 cu ft

MECHANICAL REQUIREMENTS
-----------------------
Supply Air: 2500 CFM
Supply Temperature: 55°F
Return Temperature: 75°F
Air Changes per Hour: 10.4

DIFFUSER SCHEDULE
-----------------
Qty: 4
Type: 4-way square diffuser
Size: 24" × 24"
Location: Ceiling mounted, evenly spaced

HEAT LOAD CALCULATION
---------------------
People: 20 occupants × 250 BTU/hr = 5,000 BTU/hr
Lighting: 1.5 W/sq ft × 1,200 sq ft × 3.41 BTU/hr/W = 6,138 BTU/hr
Equipment: 3,000 BTU/hr
Total Sensible: 14,138 BTU/hr (~4,143 W)

NOTES
-----
- Building orientation: South-facing windows
- Perimeter heating provided separately
- VAV system with reheat coils
